parameters.subject: Welcome to District Angels — grab a time
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $json.name.split(' ')[0] }},

Thanks for reaching out to District Angels — great to have you.

The next step is a quick intro call so we can learn what you're looking for and plug you into the right things (deal room, events, community).

Grab any time that works here: BOOKING_URL_HERE

If nothing fits, just reply to this email.

— Naviya
District Angels
